narrative:
Choctaw Lake East (precinct in Madison County) has 745 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.3 percentage points.
